value.original: No match found for any transaction: User does not match.

row.value: No se ha hecho match con ninguna Transaccion: Usuario no coincide.

value.original: No match found for any transaction: Cost center does not match.

row.value: No se ha hecho match con ninguna Transaccion: Centro de costo no coincide.

value.original: No match found for any transaction: amount value does not match.

row.value: No se ha hecho match con ninguna Transaccion: valor de importe no coincide.

value.original: No match found for any transaction.

row.value: No se ha hecho match con ninguna Transaccion.

value.original: You cannot delete a completed record or one with lines already processed.

row.value: No se puede borrar un registro completado o con lineas ya procesadas.
